allow: Bash(python -c "import ast, sys; ast.parse\(open\('app.py'\).read\(\)\); print\('app.py OK'\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Teams: {len\(d[\\"teams\\"]\)}, Venues: {len\(d[\\"venues\\"]\)}, Seasons: {len\(d[\\"seasons\\"]\)}'\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); paths=[p for p in d['paths'] if 'record' in p or 'season' in p]; print\('Registered paths:', paths\)")

PowerShell($s = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:8000/api/seasons"; Write-Host "Seasons: $\($s.seasons.Count\)"; $s.seasons | Select-Object -First 5 | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "$\($_.season\): $\($_.matches\) matches, Top: $\($_.top_scorer\) \($\($_.top_scorer_runs\) runs\)" })
